header: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-[rgba(250,249,245,0.86)] backdrop-blur-[10px] border-b border-[var(--konde-border)]
header-inner: max-w-[var(--konde-content-w)] mx-auto h-[var(--konde-nav-h)] flex items-center justify-between gap-8 px-[var(--konde-gutter)] border-x border-[var(--konde-border)]
footer-inner: max-w-[var(--konde-content-w)] mx-auto px-[var(--konde-gutter)] pt-14 pb-8 border-x border-[var(--konde-border)]
hero-2col: py-22 px-[var(--konde-gutter)] border-b border-[var(--konde-border)] grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-16 items-end
